originalDescription: Enable strict mode in tsconfig.base.json by setting "strict": true in compilerOptions. Fix any resulting type errors across all packages. This catches bugs at compile time and improves overall code quality. Check apps/admin, apps/docs, packages/hx-library, and packages/hx-tokens for type errors.
sanitizedDescription: Enable strict mode in tsconfig.base.json by setting "strict": true in compilerOptions. Fix any resulting type errors across all packages. This catches bugs at compile time and improves overall code quality. Check apps/admin, apps/docs, packages/hx-library, and packages/hx-tokens for type errors.
